title: The Glow
description: First rare/legendary item drop. The party is suspicious.

steps.text: It fell out of the monster. It was gold. It was glowing. No one moved to pick it up.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Traps are underground. This is just on the ground.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: That is not a reassurance. That is a distinction.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Monsters do not usually carry jewelry.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Yes. And the system is pleased with itself about it.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: The system? You say that like it's a person.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: I have been trying to stop. I am not succeeding.

steps.text: Someone picked it up. They moved on. Nobody admitted being pleased.
